statement_html:
On considère l'intervalle \(] wims(sort numeric item wims(makelist x for x=-20 to 20),) [\). Décrire cet intervalle en terme de distance.<br class="spacer">
L'intervalle \(] wims(sort numeric item wims(makelist x for x=-20 to 20),) [\) est l'ensemble des réels \(x\) vérifiant \(|\) \(x -\) <oef-input name="reply1" width="30"></oef-input>\(|\) <cf-slot name="reply2"></cf-slot> <oef-input name="reply3" width="30"></oef-input>.

answers.expected: (wims(sort numeric item wims(makelist x for x=-20 to 20)+))/2
()-wims(sort numeric item wims(makelist x for x=-20 to 20))/2
